title: opendownstream-PR: improve PR description
body: Add description in the PR created by opendownstream workflow, notifying maintainers about intent of these PRs

comments.body: This is an improvement, but I'd also want to know where to report issues about the bot itself.  The comments it adds are attributed to the bot, and https://github.com/podmanbot doesn't provide any pointers for people who'd have issues to report about it.

> This is an improvement, but I'd also want to know where to report issues about the bot itself. The comments it adds are attributed to the bot, and https://github.com/podmanbot doesn't provide any pointers for people who'd have issues to report about it.

@nalind Done, I added details regarding issue reporting in the last line.
